name: ComfyUI
tagline: Node-based visual AI engine and application
description: ComfyUI is a powerful open-source node-based interface and backend for designing and executing advanced generative AI workflows using diffusion models and a graph/nodes interface. It supports complex Stable Diffusion workflows on Windows, Linux, and macOS. :contentReference[oaicite:0]{index=0}

features.title: Node-based workflow design
features.description: Build complex AI generation workflows visually by connecting functional nodes on a canvas.

features.title: Generative AI engine
features.description: Execute diffusion model workflows for image, video, and other media generation with fine-grained control.

features.title: Advanced control & customization
features.description: Access and adjust low-level parameters of models and samplers to precisely tailor outputs.

features.title: Reusable & shareable workflows
features.description: Save, load, and share entire workflow configurations for reuse across projects.

features.title: Multi-platform support
features.description: Run on Windows, Linux, and macOS with support for various GPU types and CPU fallback. :contentReference[oaicite:1]{index=1}

features.title: Extensions & custom nodes
features.description: Support for community-created custom nodes and extensions to expand functionality.

features.title: Model flexibility
features.description: Integrate a wide range of diffusion and auxiliary models (e.g., ControlNet, LoRA).

features.title: Smart execution optimizations
features.description: Efficient execution that only re-runs parts of workflow graphs that change between runs. :contentReference[oaicite:2]{index=2}
